package.name: nav2_vfh_controller
package.description: Vector Field Histogram Plus (VFH+) local controller for Nav2 (nav2_core::Controller). A reactive histogram-based obstacle-avoidance controller: it builds a polar histogram of obstacles around the robot and steers toward the free angular sector best aligned with the goal. Upstream Nav2 has no VFH controller (it ships DWB, MPPI, Regulated Pure Pursuit). Part of nav2_experimental_planner: planners not in upstream Nav2.
